members.name: mk-qa-master
members.tagline: Run + analyze + advise — web (pytest / Jest / Cypress / Go), mobile (Maestro), and API (Schemathesis / Newman).
members.tagline_zh: 跨 web（pytest / Jest / Cypress / Go）、手機（Maestro）、API（Schemathesis / Newman）的執行 + 分析 + 顧問。
highlights: 7 runners across web + mobile + API — switch with one QA_RUNNER env var
analyze_url / analyze_screen — real DOM selectors + live mobile hierarchy, no hallucinated classes
generate_test — runnable pytest .py or Maestro .yaml; Schemathesis auto-fuzzes any OpenAPI schema
get_optimization_plan — classifies broken vs flaky vs slow-regression with evidence from run history

members.name: mk-spec-master
members.tagline: Specs → scenarios → tests, with bidirectional spec ↔ test traceability.
members.tagline_zh: 規格 → 場景 → 測試,雙向 spec ↔ test 追蹤。
highlights: 6 spec sources: Markdown, GitHub Issues, Linear, JIRA, Notion, Figma
Spec-quality coach: vague-language + implementation-leak + unclear-role heuristics
auto_link_tests — scan @spec: tags from Python / JS / TS / Go test files
v0.4 self-reinforcement: history trend, chronic-drift signature, tool-usage telemetry

members.name: mk-plan-master
members.tagline: Ideas in, prioritized plans out. Spec drafts that hand straight to mk-spec-master.
members.tagline_zh: 點子進,排序好的計劃出。Spec draft 直接遞給 mk-spec-master。
highlights: analyze_initiative — senior-PM analysis SOP (default / lite / lean_canvas frameworks)
generate_spec_draft hands off to mk-spec-master.parse_spec — verified end-to-end
RICE + Impact-Effort scoring with file-based decision index
Self-reinforcement built in: history + decision signature + telemetry

future.name: mk-perf-master
future.tagline: Performance audit MCP — Lighthouse / Core Web Vitals / bundle analyzer behind one coach.
future.tagline_zh: 效能審查 MCP —— Lighthouse / Core Web Vitals / bundle 分析包進一個 coach。

future.name: mk-a11y-master
future.tagline: Accessibility audit MCP — axe-core / Pa11y / WCAG 2.2 with prioritized remediation.
future.tagline_zh: 無障礙審查 MCP —— axe-core / Pa11y / WCAG 2.2，附優先級修復計畫。
